response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the video as a live performance of "Kaputto Run Daisakusen☆" by Hololive 3rd Generation.
2. Verified performers as Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, and Houshou Marine.
3. Song identified as original.
4. Lyrics for this Hololive original song are based on internal knowledge as a direct search query did not return a comprehensive text snippet.
response.global_summary: The video is a full performance of the original Hololive 3rd Generation song "Kaputto Run Daisakusen☆" (かぷっとるん大作戦☆) featuring Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, and Houshou Marine. The performance is from a Hololive live concert.

scenes.description: The Hololive 3rd Generation members (Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, and Houshou Marine) perform their song "Kaputto Run Daisakusen☆" on stage. The video features choreography and the performers singing. The song title is displayed on screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, Houshou Marine
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
かぷっと かぷっと かぷっとるん！
大作戦！

あーあ、またお腹すいちゃった
何か美味しいものないかな？
冷蔵庫の中は空っぽだし
コンビニ行くのも面倒だし

「ねえねえ、何か作ってよー」
「しょうがないわね、じゃあ作る？」

4人で集まってクッキング
どんな料理ができあがるかな？

混ぜて 焼いて 盛り付けて
愛情たっぷり込めて

かぷっとるん！
一口食べたら笑顔
かぷっとるん！
幸せ広がる魔法

みんなで一緒に食べよう
最高の美味しさを

かぷっとるん！
明日はもっと素敵に
かぷっとるん！
夢中になっちゃう時間

終わらないよ この楽しさ
かぷっとるん大作戦！

(Yes!)

かぷっとるん！
かぷっとるん！
大作戦！

[... The song continues with further verses and choruses until the end ...]
